topic.title: INFO 7375 Branding & AI — Final Presentation — Group Two
topic.text:
Hi everyone,

Finals presentations will take place next Saturday. Group 2, please submit your presentation ASAP. The earlier you get it in, the better your chances of getting feedback from me before you present. Attendance will be taken either during the break or right after the final presentation.

There are only two minutes between each presentation, so I won't have time to comment on your presentation.

Reminder -- Group 2 Schedule, Saturday, April 25, 2026

12:00 — Karthik Kashyap 12:14 — Vivek Nikam 12:28 — Janhavi Patil 12:42 — Rupam Patra 12:56 — Abhishek Prakash 1:10 — Rajat Puli 1:24 — Dhyeykumar Rabadiya

1:38 – 1:53 BREAK

1:53 — Gunashree Rajakumar 2:07 — Aravind Ravi 2:21 — Manisha Sahu 2:35 — Ishaan Samel 2:49 — Deepa Shenoy 3:03 — Ananya Thathigowdara

See you Saturday.

— Prof. Nik & Nina
